commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainers must first choose whether models may clear goals and whether terminal replacement should be implicit; automation should not select that product and authority contract.; Needs attention: The patch adds a model-executable session and filesystem mutation without central mutation-policy classification.; Review finding: [P1] Prevent clear_goal from deleting active goals — src/agents/tools/goal-tools.ts... (sha=bdaa575254aff4a69f39d14039b20d6d3aa45d30)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a model-facing `clear_goal` tool, makes `create_goal` automatically replace terminal goals, and appends removed goal records to `memory/goal-archive.jsonl`.

PR surface: Source +134, Tests +182. Total +316 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main deterministically rejects `create_goal` whenever a goal already exists, while clearing remains available only through user-facing `/goal` controls.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers must first choose whether models may clear goals and whether terminal replacement should be implicit; automation should not select that product and authority contract.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
